meaning: 摩尔曼斯克[苏联西北部港市](临科拉湾)
examples: Two men tried to hijack a plane on a flight from Riga to Murmansk.
Russiahas recently started shipping oil from an offshore terminal in the Pechora Sea to Murmansk.
Today, the city of Murmansk hasn't forgotten its part in that history.
Some plant owners are lobbying the government to let them bring in Russian workers from Murmansk.
Their ships sailed from Loch Ewe in the north west Highlands to re-supply the Soviet ports of Murmansk and Archangel.
